typecheck.detail: Success: no issues found in 42 source files

appliedUpdates.description: Added benchmark_ast, benchmark_ast_workflow, and benchmark_gpu commands to services.yaml. These benchmark scripts exist in benchmarks/ but were not listed, making benchmark selection less discoverable for workers handling AST or GPU/NLP changes.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify in the backend-worker skill that test-only coverage features (where implementation already exists) may validate existing behavior directly rather than following the strict TDD red-first step. The current TDD-first requirement causes unnecessary deviations for coverage-fill features.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature add-contract-fallback-torch-tests worker deviated from TDD-first because the pipeline implementation already existed from the prerequisite contract-fallback-hardening feature. Tests passed immediately on first run. Worker documented the deviation and suggested clarifying the skill.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add guidance to the backend-worker skill that cyBERT/NLP availability changes should use run_gpu_benchmarks.py rather than the generic text/hot benchmark pair. This is now also discoverable via services.yaml (benchmark_gpu command) after the services.yaml update applied in this round.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature fix-cybert-backend-protocol worker had to consult AGENTS.md to determine the correct benchmark for NLP changes. Worker suggested adding this to the skill.
